subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances that wafted from the Abhá Kingdom in this luminous morn when the rays of light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات انتشرت من ملکوت الابهی در این صبح نورانی که پرتو انوار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
